scope: Current Magenta Harness component inventory: general-harness runtime providers and declarations, TUI harness-facing interface modules, and AutOmicScience domain pack components. crates/magenta-hcp remains protocol-only and is not categorized as a Harness component.
architecture_boundary: HCP is Harness Call Protocol/backplane, not a component category.
Magnet is the connector layer for existing implementations mounted under HCP targets.
General Harness is domain-free; packs are domain-specific.
LLM-facing surface should stay light; this JSON is operator/debugging inventory, not prompt vocabulary.

origin_relationship_legend.native: Authored in Magenta for the current HCP/Magnet/Eventful Harness architecture.
origin_relationship_legend.vendored/adapted: Code package or substantial implementation is copied/adapted into this repo; evidence should include a local Reference_Repo path.
origin_relationship_legend.reference/reimplemented: Capability or design is clearly referenced, but implementation here is separate Magenta code.
origin_relationship_legend.adapter-boundary/reference: Only a boundary or compatibility target is declared; upstream is not copied into General Harness.
origin_relationship_legend.external runtime boundary: External runtime/SDK is named as an adapter boundary or dependency direction.
origin_relationship_legend.domain-specific native pack: Domain pack material under packs/, outside domain-free General Harness.

magenta.label: Magenta native
magenta.description: Code and declarations authored in this repo for HCP, Magnet, and the native Eventful Harness Kernel.

pi.label: PI
pi.description: PI is the clear source for the vendored TypeScript TUI package and a design reference for model/tool/session concepts.

oh-my-pi.label: oh-my-pi
oh-my-pi.relationship: reference/inspiration unless exact vendoring is listed
oh-my-pi.description: Reference for hashline, native tool concepts, richer model catalog/auth, snapcompact/session ideas, and agent runtime patterns.

opencode.label: OpenCode
opencode.description: Referenced for provider routing/gateway/catalog separation and external comparison, not mounted as General Harness code.

lazypi.label: LazyPi
lazypi.description: Reference for background job monitor, sub-agent/background shell UX, floating overlays, and side-chat concepts; Magenta renames Jobs to Events.

mix-pi.label: mix_pi
mix-pi.description: Local mixed PI/LazyPi reference snapshot. Used as contextual reference only in the current inventory.

external-upstream.label: External upstream
external-upstream.description: External systems named by manifests as adapter or execution boundaries.

domain-pack.label: AutOmicScience pack
domain-pack.description: Domain-specific omics harness pack under packs/, not Magenta core/general-harness.

scaffold-posture.summary: Default posture and component registry loaded from general-harness/harness.toml.

native-kernel-providers.summary: Rust HCP providers for sessions, trace, context, hooks, events, loops, governance, approval, resolve/conflict/eval, model surface, capability catalog, and routing.

process-tool-magnets.summary: Executable tool manifests mounted as tool://* through the Rust process-tool provider and helper binary.

declared-tool-metadata.summary: Metadata-only tool declarations exposed as declared://* and used for catalog/surface descriptions.

external-magnets.summary: API, MCP server, HCP-process, agent-provider, and adapter boundary manifests.

runtime-wrappers.summary: Shell/Python/Node/R/Julia wrappers compiled to runtime://process plus wasm/plugin boundary.

events-and-event-tools.summary: Magenta-native long-running Event manager plus background shell and sub-agent event tools. LazyPi job-monitor UX is a reference, but state is Event-first.

components.name: manager
components.origin_rel: UX concept adapted into native Event kernel

components.name: bg_shell
components.origin_rel: UX concept adapted into native Event kernel

components.name: sub_agent
components.origin_rel: UX concept adapted into native Event kernel

loops.summary: ReAct, plan-execute, and async-event loop providers.

skills-memories-recipes.summary: Domain-free skill, memory, and recipe material exposed through HCP providers.

llm-surface-gateway.summary: LLM provider abstraction, route/catalog/readiness, gateway normalization, effort metadata, and model-facing surface.

mcp-compat.summary: MCP-style tools/list and tools/call facade plus stdio bridge backed by HCP.

tui.summary: TypeScript TUI: pi-tui is vendored from PI; magenta-tui is Magenta-specific and adapts LazyPi event monitor/overlay ideas.

automic-science-pack.summary: Domain-specific bioinformatics/omics pack with process tools, Rust dispatcher, Python runtime module, and skill bundles.
